# OHIP Trigger Keywords

## Skill Activation

- ohip
- oracle hospitality
- DumboBroker
- OhipActionType
- InterfaceBusinessOHIP

## Route Keywords

- Overview route:
  - what is ohip, architecture, explain ohip, how it works
- Registry route:
  - action registry, implemented actions, action status, supported event types
- Mode route:
  - neweventtype, eventhandler, apiintegration, dtomapping, tests, validate, preflight
- End-to-end route:
  - endtoend, full implementation, implement complete action

## Guard Keywords (route away)

- tax, taxrate, taxrule, taxcalculator -> tax skill
- architect, archon, ad2, adr, son, srd -> architect skill
- checklist, standards review, pr review -> reviewnet skill
- nomenclature, app id, synxisnom -> synxisnom skill
